Evidence: L1 (substrate prose mirror via audit delegation + family-keyed reviewer step 2 + Tier-2 Unresolved-Liveness audit ref; no behavioral change). L1 required for #11800 ACs (textual presence/absence checks). No residuals.

Mirrors the active-peer quorum rule (per Epic **#11796** / Discussion **#11793**, source-of-truth substrate in PR #11805 — now merged) into the PR-merge-gate Axis-2 codification at `pull-request-workflow.md §6.1.1`. Uses Map/World Atlas extraction per the `oversized-workflow-map` lint guidance; the canonical operational shape (family-keyed Signal Ledger template, Axis-2 quorum citation, reviewer-step #2 quorum-verification, reviewer-step #5 Tier-2 verification, rejection-mode enumeration) lives in the new `.agents/skills/pull-request/audits/consensus-gate-mirror.md` sibling. Inline §6.1.1 unambiguously delegates the active rule to the audit, with the stale per-peer template + "100% APPROVED" + "all 3 signals" + per-peer reviewer step 2 REMOVED (not just pointer-around) to eliminate split-brain substrate.

## Deltas from ticket (if any)

**Iteration arc this PR went through:**
1. **Commit `141967885` (initial inline replacement)** — tripped `oversized-workflow-map` lint (+1394B vs +250B cap).
2. **Commit `a8c083300` (Cycle 1 lint fix — audit extraction)** — created new `audits/consensus-gate-mirror.md` + added inline pointer. Net delta dropped to +167B. BUT left split-brain: stale per-peer Signal Ledger template / "100% APPROVED" / reviewer step 2 still inline below the pointer, reading as canonical to readers.
3. **Commit `b826b91a3` (Cycle 2 stale-substrate removal)** — REMOVED the stale per-peer Signal Ledger template block; rewrote reviewer step 2 to family-keyed shape (with Tier-2 Unresolved-Liveness audit ref); replaced "100% APPROVED" in Axis 2 paragraph with "§6.2 quorum (canonical: audit pointer above)". Net delta vs origin/dev: **+112B** (under 250B cap; substrate-quality outcome: §6.1.1 readers now see ONE canonical rule, audit-delegated and family-keyed, instead of competing inline+audit shapes).
4. **This PR-body revision (Cycle 2 body-only fix)** — updates PR body to reflect current head `b826b91a3` state (removes false stale-inline claims, updates byte evidence to current +112B, lists all 3 commits, updates reviewer note for the Cycle 2 substrate-quality outcome).

Three audit-anchor sections preserved verbatim (empirical-anchor lines 209-211 of original): the "before Discussion #11210 reached 100% APPROVED" historical reference is a historical event description, not a current rule.

## Substrate-Mutation Slot-Rationale (per pull-request-workflow.md §1.1)

This PR touches `.agents/skills/pull-request/**` — slot-rationale enumeration:

**Added: `.agents/skills/pull-request/audits/consensus-gate-mirror.md` (NEW FILE)**
- **Disposition:** `keep` (reference-grade canonical Axis-2 substrate; loaded on-demand via delegation from `references/pull-request-workflow.md §6.1.1`).
- **3-axis rating:** trigger-frequency MEDIUM (every substrate-PR from a high-blast Discussion needs Axis-2 verification); failure-severity HIGH (getting Axis-2 wrong = substrate-PR merged with stale 3-peer interpretation); enforceability MEDIUM (delegation pointer reader-visible; canonical content in audit).
- **Rationale for keep:** audit file IS the compress-to-trigger destination per Map/World Atlas. `references/pull-request-workflow.md §6.1.1` now unambiguously delegates active rule to audit.

**Modified: `.agents/skills/pull-request/references/pull-request-workflow.md §6.1.1`**
- **Disposition delta:** stale operational substrate REMOVED + audit-delegation pointer added; reviewer step 2 + Axis 2 paragraph rewritten to family-keyed shape.
- **Reason:** Cycle 1 lint failure (`oversized-workflow-map` +1394B) drove Map/World Atlas extraction. Cycle 1 review on the extraction caught split-brain substrate — inline content still operational-shaped post-pointer. Cycle 2 fix removed/rewrote the stale operational content.
- **3-axis rating:** trigger-frequency HIGH (turn-loaded with `pull-request` skill); failure-severity HIGH (canonical Axis-2 reference for PR-merge gates); enforceability HIGH (`oversized-workflow-map` + `lint-skill-manifest` + `lint-pr-body` all enforce mechanically).
- **Net delta:** +112B (under 250B oversized-workflow-map cap).

**Retired:** stale per-peer Signal Ledger template block (lines 195-210 of pre-Cycle-2 §6.1.1), stale per-peer reviewer step 2, stale "100% APPROVED" / "all 3 signals" mandatory phrases. These remain visible in the audit file's `§signal-ledger-template` and `§reviewer-quorum-step` in family-keyed form.
